headings.usage: H1 text-5xl to text-6xl with tracking-tight, H2 text-3xl to text-4xl

body.usage: text-base for main body text, leading-relaxed

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-16 inside sections. Asymmetrical bento grid for product showcase and weather suggestion.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Wide spans for hero content, narrow for supplementary data.

surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10 for Entry form overlay and sticky header.
surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px solid border-white/10. No dropshadows, rely on 1px borders for definition.

motion.hover: Subtle translate-y-1, border color transition to primary (#D4AF37)
motion.entry: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items and product variants.

components_strategy.entry_form: Custom full-screen modal with glassmorphism over the hero background. Shadcn Input fields but customized with dark background, 1px white/10 border, gold focus ring.
components_strategy.weather_recommendation: Bento-style card next to the product or above it. Minimalist typography for temperature.
components_strategy.product_display: Asymmetric bento grid. Huge image on the left (col-span-12 md:col-span-7), details and variants on the right (col-span-12 md:col-span-5). Variants shown as large clickable bordered blocks.

logo.usage: Header navigation and entry form modal.

hero_background.usage: Full width background for the landing entry modal / hero section, behind a bg-black/60 overlay.

product_estate_premium.usage: Main product image for the 250g/500g tea product section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Important: Generate .js and .jsx files instead of .tsx files. Follow standard React JS conventions.
Initial State: Show a full-screen entry form overlay (collecting Name, Age, Place). Do not let user see main page until filled.
Form State: Use the hero_background image behind the entry form. Apply backdrop-blur-xl and bg-black/60 to the form container.
After Entry: Transition to the main e-commerce page.
Header: Sticky nav with Crystal Glass style (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-black/60, bottom border border-white/10). Include Logo.

Hero/Weather Section: Take the 'Place' entered, dynamically determine a fake/mocked weather if no real API available, and suggest a tea recipe (e.g., 'Hot Estate Classic for cold 12°C' or 'Iced Estate Peach for 30°C'). Highlight this in a bento card.
Product Section: Display 'Estate Premium Tea'. Show two large un-styled looking variant buttons (250g - Rs. 200, 500g - Rs. 400). Highlight selected state with gold border.
Add to Cart: A prominent button using the primary gold color.
Order Summary: Simple list view showing selected item and total price.
Typography: Use Cormorant Garamond for headings, Outfit for body. Include tracking-tight on large headings.

Testing: Add data-testid attributes to all form inputs (e.g., 'name-input', 'age-input', 'place-input'), submit buttons ('entry-submit-button'), product variants ('variant-250g', 'variant-500g'), and cart buttons ('add-to-cart-button').
Strictly follow the color palette. No teal, no purple. Black, deep charcoal, off-white, and gold only.
